meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish Your SaaS App Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your dev projects. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build, deploy, and launch your first real-world SaaS app today.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from scope creep and architectural paralysis. The Antigravity project template eliminates this by enforcing a modular, feature-gated foundation. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate and focus purely on core business logic, ensuring your project reaches deployment-ready status in record time.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect app, only to find yourself buried in a graveyard of half-finished repositories. The excitement of the initial commit has long faded, replaced by the crushing weight of scope creep and technical debt. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a production-grade framework that enforces momentum.

This is where the Antigravity project template changes the game. It acts as an exoskeleton for your creativity, providing a battle-tested structure that demands completion. When combined with the iterative power of Claude Code, you stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping actual value. It is time to stop being a student who builds prototypes and start being an engineer who launches products.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the Antigravity template, which includes pre-configured CI/CD and modular architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production-ready template. Include authentication, database schema, and standard API routing.

steps.title: Define the Minimum Viable Scope
steps.description: Use Claude to strip away non-essential features, ensuring you focus on the core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements. Identify the three core features that constitute a functional MVP and create a modular plan to implement them.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review my core features and suggest a 3-stage roadmap to MVP'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate with Claude Code
steps.description: Delegate repetitive API and database boilerplate to Claude Code to maintain high velocity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the RESTful API endpoints for user profile management and data persistence using the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate API routes for user management using existing schema'

steps.title: Implement Feature-Gated Development
steps.description: Build in isolation to prevent breaking the main branch, allowing for rapid testing of individual features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feature flag configuration for the new dashboard module to ensure safe deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Setup environment-based feature flags for dashboard'

steps.title: Final Review and Deployment
steps.description: Perform a final code review with Claude Code to ensure compliance with production standards before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a comprehensive security and performance audit on the codebase before the initial production push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Audit codebase for security vulnerabilities and optimize build config'

pro_tips: Always commit after every successful Claude Code block execution to maintain a granular version history.
Use the Antigravity 'dry-run' mode before applying automated refactors to avoid breaking core dependencies.
Limit your daily scope to one single feature module; never touch the core architecture after the initial setup.
Treat your README.md as a live log; update it via Claude Code after every session to stay aligned with the project vision.
When stuck, ask Claude Code to explain the specific Antigravity design pattern being used to deepen your architectural knowledge.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://github.com/saas-patterns
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, audit your codebase against the Antigravity performance benchmarks and refactor one major module to improve latency by 20%.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the roadmap, and the expertise to stop stalling and start building. Don't let another project sit in your drafts folder. The world needs what you are building. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
